name: AgentOps Scenario Contracts Canary
description: Offline public canary for holdout scenario schema, scenario skill docs, CLI docs, and isolated scenario authoring validation.

cases.title: scenario schema preserves holdout fields
cases.objective: Ensure the scenario schema still captures the behavioral holdout contract.

cases.title: scenario skill documents authoring and validation
cases.objective: Keep the scenario skill contract tied to scenario add, list, and validate workflows.

expectations.value: The implementing agent MUST NOT author its own scenarios

cases.title: scenario CLI docs include add and validate
cases.objective: Ensure generated CLI docs expose scenario authoring and validation commands.

cases.title: scenario add and validate work in an isolated workspace
cases.objective: Exercise scenario authoring without touching repo-local holdouts.

inputs.shell: tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; repo=$PWD; (cd "$repo/cli" && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go build -o "$tmp/ao" ./cmd/ao); cd "$tmp"; ./ao scenario add "eval scenario canary" --json > scenario.json; id=$(python3 -c 'import json; print(json.load(open("scenario.json"))["id"])'); test -f ".agents/holdout/${id}.json"; ./ao scenario validate >/dev/null
